title: gate-result/v1 — REDIRECT TO KERNEL CANONICAL SCHEMA
description:
STUB. This file is a REDIRECT. The canonical normative JSON Schema for the gate-result/v1 predicate body is published at @intentsolutions/core/schemas/v1/gate-result.schema.json. Do not edit this file — edits here have no normative force; the kernel schema wins on conflict per ISEDC Session 5 Decision Record (018-AT-DECR-isedc-council-session-5-jrig-reconciliation-2026-05-21.md) and Blueprint B § 7.4.

Canonical sources:
  - npm package: @intentsolutions/core/schemas/v1/gate-result.schema.json
  - github raw:  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jeremylongshore/intent-eval-core/main/schemas/v1/gate-result.schema.json
  - blueprint:   intent-eval-lab/000-docs/012-AT-ARCH-platform-runtime-blueprint.md § 7.4 (normative prose)

Validator behavior: this stub forwards via $ref to the kernel's canonical schema. Validators that follow cross-origin $ref will resolve against the kernel; validators that do not should fetch the kernel directly via npm or GitHub.

Migration history: the prior content of this file mirrored the v0.1.0-draft predicate shape (`result` enum, `timestamp` field, no `gate_name`/`gate_version`/`gate_reasons`/`coverage`/`policy_ref`). That shape was superseded by Blueprint B § 7.4 NORMATIVE (merged 2026-05-15 to lab main) and locked in kernel @intentsolutions/core@0.1.0 (published 2026-05-17 with sigstore provenance). The redirect lands per ISEDC Session 5 DR 018 § 6.4 Option α-minus.
